name: Yuma Mukami
description:
Hello there:D

Not so long ago, I discovered Diabolik Lovers for myself. At first, I got interested in characters’ looks solely, but then I got deeper into lore. I was a damn big mistake.

Reading and studying characters, I realised that I am.. horrified? I don’t know, but I think that REJET had no other options than to make every single male character sadistic. Meh.

I decided that I won’t leave it like that(sounds too sappy, I know), so I wanted to make my version of DL characters here. Let’s call it DLFR, for short. Diabolik Lovers Fan Remake:>

Now, about Yuma. In short: A gentle giant that loves tomatoes and has pretty short memory. I included some of my own headcanons in his description, so don’t be surprised!:D Have fun c:

This himbo is my first character here, so it will be pretty awkward. It won’t work perfectly, I know.

Drew it myself:D
creator: Flamerin
